1.gloss: and went in to spend the night

9.gloss: So the source of his strength

13.gloss: the web of a loom [and tighten it with a pin, I will become as weak as any other man.]

14.gloss: [So while he slept, Delilah took the seven braids of his hair and wove them into the web].

17.gloss: and I will become as weak

19.gloss: And having lulled him to sleep
